# Manav Baghel — Backend Developer

> Developer portfolio of Manav Baghel, a B.Tech Computer Science student specializing in backend software engineering with Java, Spring Boot, Python, Flask, and cloud technologies.

## About
Manav Baghel is a Backend Developer based in Punjab, India. He builds scalable REST APIs, database-backed architectures, and containerized distributed systems.

- **Email**: [manavbaghhel@gmail.com](mailto:manavbaghhel@gmail.com)
- **GitHub**: [github.com/manav-2812](https://github.com/manav-2812)
- **LinkedIn**: [linkedin.com/in/manav-baghel](https://linkedin.com/in/manav-baghel)

## Technical Skills
- **Languages**: Java, Python, JavaScript, SQL, HTML/CSS
- **Backend & Frameworks**: Spring Boot, Spring Security, JPA/Hibernate, Flask, Express.js
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB
- **DevOps & Cloud**: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Git, GitHub Actions, Vercel

## Key Projects
- **GrabBite**: A microservices-based food ordering platform using Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, PostgreSQL, and RabbitMQ.
- **AutoGrade**: An automated code assessment system containerized with Docker, managing safe code sandbox execution.
- **SmartInventory**: A spring-boot based inventory management system with real-time stock notifications and analytics.
